description: Trigger SDK regeneration on @ama-sdk update, with private registry authentication for Yarn Berry (Yarn >= 2). Configures Yarn home config (~/.yarnrc.yml) on the Renovate runner so install and SDK migration can authenticate against a private registry. arg0: scheme-less registry URL with trailing slash (e.g. '//npm.my-company.example/api/npm/npm/'). arg1: name of the environment variable holding the base64-encoded 'user:password' token (e.g. 'NPM_AUTH_BASE64'); must be exposed to Renovate via customEnvVariables. If your registry uses a bearer token instead, replace npmAuthIdent with npmAuthToken in this preset. References: https://yarnpkg.com/configuration/yarnrc ; https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2
